title: Investigate AI-Hub Korean pet skin dataset access
description: Determine whether the AI-Hub Korean companion animal skin disease dataset can be accessed for PetCare training. Record registration requirements, license/usage restrictions, data format, classes, dog/cat split, annotations, and whether it can be mirrored or only referenced. Do not download or publish until terms are clear.
close_reason: Investigated official AI-Hub 561 pet skin dataset access, terms, format, counts, API inventory, and mirror risks. Dataset is high-value but not acquired because approval, Korean-national application, foreign-use/export, and redistribution constraints must be resolved first. Documented in docs/ml/data/aihub-561-pet-skin.md.

title: Acquire and normalize Mendeley dog skin disease dataset
description: Download and inspect the Hwang/Yoon Mendeley Data dog dermatology dataset identified during scouting. Verify license, RGB suitability, class counts, consent/provenance notes, and map labels to the PetCare canonical taxonomy. Output a manifest and normalized local/HF-ready layout without mixing into the frozen gold eval set.
close_reason: Acquired Mendeley 5dbht54kw7 v1 locally, verified 99 JPEGs with 0 hash mismatches, created normalized manifest/layout preserving unlabeled sources, and documented provenance/license/label gaps. Follow-up petcare-triage-service-105 tracks the missing 33 folder labels.

title: Curate independent pet dermatology training data
description: Build a licensed, provenance-tracked training data expansion path that prioritizes genuinely independent sources over duplicated Kaggle/Roboflow mirrors. Scope includes Mendeley, AI-Hub access research, HF/Roboflow candidates only after license and perceptual-dedup checks, and a versioned HF dataset manifest.

title: Build dedup-filtered Roboflow bootstrap training split
description: Use the acquired Roboflow v2 manifest plus Mendeley and future gold manifests to exclude exact and perceptual near-duplicates before training. Preserve removed rows in a filter report, keep healthy as healthy_skin, and output a PetCare-owned bootstrap train/val layout.

title: Export Roboflow dog derm dataset if smoke test passes
description: If Roboflow Universe smoke testing is plausible, export only the primary taxonomy-aligned project/version metadata and dataset copy for controlled PetCare training. Preserve raw export, version metadata, license page snapshot, class mapping, Unlabeled entries, and perceptual hashes. Run dedup against Mendeley and future gold data before any supervised training use.
notes: Roboflow v2 folder export acquired locally: 4,398 images / 198M, CC BY 4.0 uploader-declared, resized 640x640. Prepared manifest has 4,398 rows. Hosted model comparison on 40 Roboflow test samples: primary classifier 39/40 comparable correct; clinical taxonomy model 15/20 comparable correct; detector 5/40. Exact SHA overlap vs Mendeley is 0, but pHash finds 8 near-duplicate/derivative matches at distance <=4, so Roboflow must be dedup-filtered before training and cannot be used as independent eval.
close_reason: Completed Roboflow v2 export, local preparation, hosted model comparison, Mendeley exact/pHash dedup check, and documentation. Follow-up dedup-filtered training split tracked separately as petcare-triage-service-0hl.

title: Smoke test Roboflow dog derm Universe models
description: Run a no-download Roboflow Inference probe against selected Universe models, starting with dog-skin-disease-dataset/2 and dog-skin-disease-prediction/3. Use a fixed local probe set covering Mendeley labeled images, Mendeley unlabeled_source images, obvious non-skin pet images, and human skin OOD examples. Record model IDs, API requirements, observed label behavior, latency/cost implications, and whether outputs are plausible enough to justify dataset export.
notes: Live Roboflow smoke test completed after base64 payload fix. Dry-run selects 10 Mendeley probes across bacterial_pyoderma, fungal_malassezia, atopic_dermatitis, healthy_skin, and unlabeled_source. Live run produced 30/30 HTTP 200 responses. Hosted model behavior is not reliable enough for PetCare reuse: taxonomy-aligned classifier over-predicts healthy on disease probes; clinical-named classifier over-predicts ringworm/mange; detector over-calls bacterial dermatosis. Results documented in docs/ml/data/roboflow-smoke-test.md.
close_reason: Executed live Roboflow Universe smoke test with 10 Mendeley probes across 3 model IDs. API integration works after base64 payload fix: 30/30 requests returned HTTP 200. Results do not support reusing hosted model behavior; documented model outputs and recommendation in docs/ml/data/roboflow-smoke-test.md.

title: Resolve missing labels in Mendeley dog skin dataset
description: Mendeley dataset 5dbht54kw7 v1 has 95 source folders but image_label.txt labels only 62 folders. Determine whether a complete label table exists in the paper/supplement/API, or route the 33 unlabeled folders through manual/vet adjudication before supervised training use.

title: Define confidence-calibrated abstention policy
description: Turn model confidence into safe triage behavior. Use calibration curves to choose per-class thresholds and emit the contract unknown/low-confidence path when precision is not high enough. Report precision/coverage tradeoffs per class.

title: Implement OOD and image-quality input gate
description: Reject non-dog-skin, unsupported species, blurry, dark, or otherwise low-quality inputs before forcing a disease label. Define thresholds using OOD/quality negatives from the gold set and wire results into the contract quality/OOD fields.

title: Train calibrated classifier and offline eval harness
description: Replace directional baseline-only evaluation with a reproducible offline harness: per-class recall, confusion matrix, calibration/ECE, OOD AUROC, and model card metrics against the frozen gold set. The service must keep the same inference contract.

title: Design and implement consented capture buffer plus HF sync
description: Implement the service-side half of architecture B: after inference and explicit consent, write image plus JSONL metadata to a local buffer and provide a batch sync step to a private Hugging Face dataset. Capture must be best-effort and never block triage. Outcome/correction fields start nullable until a return-flow exists.

title: Build vet-verified frozen gold evaluation set
description: Create the service-owned gold eval workflow: sourcing plan, vet labeling/adjudication, quality/OOD flags, provenance manifest, and HF versioning. Keep it frozen and never train on it. Include phone/in-the-wild style images so validation reflects real app uploads.

title: Evaluate Roboflow Universe dog dermatosis data with license and dedup
description: Assess Roboflow Universe dog dermatosis candidates only as augmentation after independent-source work. Verify license, export terms, class taxonomy, duplicate/augmentation patterns, and perceptual dedup requirements. Produce a go/no-go note and normalized mapping if usable.
close_reason: Evaluated Roboflow dog dermatology candidates, identified usable pretrained Universe model IDs for smoke testing, documented taxonomy mapping, model-vs-finetune constraints, license/provenance risks, and follow-up path. Follow-ups: petcare-triage-service-1zk for no-download model smoke test and petcare-triage-service-jqj for controlled export if the smoke test passes.

title: Evaluate HF vet-derm derived dataset with dedup guardrails
description: Inspect shrayyyy/vet-derm-dataset or equivalent HF-derived veterinary dermatology data. Treat it as potentially derived from the same Roboflow/Kaggle lineage. Verify license, source lineage, label quality, and run perceptual dedup against existing training and gold-eval candidates before allowing any training use.
